Description:

Gyeon Q²M SilkDryer EVO - The Ultimate Drying Towel for Perfect Car Care

The Gyeon Q²M SilkDryer EVO is an updated and improved version of one of the most innovative drying towels on the market. The special twist-loop microfiber rapidly changed the drying process in car washing upon its introduction. Compared to the previous version, the EVO variant now boasts an even higher weight per square meter.

Enhanced Drying Performance with Innovative Twist-Loop Microfiber

The Gyeon Q²M SilkDryer EVO sets new standards in car care. With its advanced twist-loop synthetic fibers, it offers impressive drying performance and a streak-free finish. The latest EVO version of this innovative drying towel impresses with a higher weight of 530 gsm and up to 50% improved total absorption capacity compared to earlier versions.

The Gyeon Classic for Car Drying

The EVO version is also characterized by minimally reduced edges, making the towel even more functional and safe on complex-shaped surfaces. This drying towel is a must-have for all car enthusiasts who demand the highest standards in caring for and detailing their vehicles. Discover the future of car drying with the Gyeon Q²M SilkDryer EVO and enjoy every detail of your vehicle in flawless shine. Available in two different sizes and as the SilkMit drying glove.

FAQ:

Question: How do I use the Silk Dryer towel optimally? The two sides are different.

Answer: Both sides are suitable for drying, but the long pile side is the better option. The twisted fibers have less contact with the surface. Lay this side of the towel flat and, using the two bottom corners, pull the towel across the paintwork. The fibers will absorb the water. The flat back side, with its surface structure, is ideal for cleaning glass.

Features / Specifications:
- Material: 70% Polyester / 30% Polyamid
- Gewicht: 530 gsm

Gyeon Q2M Silk Dryer EVO

Description:

Q2M Silk Dryer EVO

Improved and more absorbent than ever! Twist-loop, synthetic fibers for impressive drying and a streak-free finish.

Experience the pinnacle of drying performance with the GYEON Q²M Silk Dryer EVO. This updated and improved version of our renowned drying towel offers unparalleled absorbency and a gentle, streak-free finish. With a higher GSM of 530 and up to 50% increased absorbency, the Silk Dryer EVO makes drying your vehicle faster, safer, and more efficient than ever.

Why Choose GYEON Q²M Silk Dryer EVO?

- Improved Absorbency: Higher GSM (530) and up to 50% increased absorbency compared to the previous version.
- Gentle Drying: Twist-loop synthetic fibers glide effortlessly across surfaces, minimizing the risk of marring or dragging.
- Streak-Free Finish: Designed to leave a flawless, streak-free finish with just one pass.
- Edge-less Design: Reduced edges to an absolute minimum for enhanced functionality and safety on complex panels.
- Superior Water Absorption: Soaks up water with ease, significantly reducing drying time.
- High-Quality Construction: Made with an 80:20 blend of polyester and polyamide for exceptional durability and performance.

Key Features:
- Twist-loop synthetic fibers.
- 530 GSM weight.
- Edge-less (laser cut) design.
- Size: 70 x 90 cm.
- Blend: 80:20 (Polyester:Polyamide).
- Increased absorbency (up to 50% higher).

Pro Tip:
- Gently glide the towel across wet surfaces for optimal water absorption.
- Use light pressure to prevent marring.
- Refer to our microfiber towel guide for proper care and usage.
